Software Developer.description: Software developers design, build, test, and maintain applications and systems software. They work across a variety of domains including web, desktop, enterprise, and embedded systems.

Data Scientist.description: Data scientists collect, analyze, and interpret complex datasets to generate actionable business insights. They blend statistical expertise with machine learning and domain knowledge.

AI/ML Engineer.description: AI/ML Engineers research, design, and deploy machine learning models and AI systems. They require strong mathematical foundations and advanced programming skills.

Cybersecurity Analyst.description: Cybersecurity analysts protect organizational systems and networks from cyber threats. They monitor systems, analyze vulnerabilities, and implement security protocols.

Cloud Engineer.description: Cloud engineers design, implement, and manage cloud infrastructure and services. They enable scalable, reliable, and cost-efficient deployment of applications.

Product Manager.description: Product managers drive the vision, strategy, and execution of products. They bridge technical teams and business stakeholders, ensuring products meet user needs and business goals.

UX Designer.description: UX designers craft user experiences for digital products, combining design thinking with user research and prototyping to create intuitive, accessible interfaces.

Digital Marketer.description: Digital marketers plan and execute online marketing campaigns across SEO, SEM, social media, email, and content platforms to grow brand presence and drive business results.

Business Analyst.description: Business analysts bridge the gap between business needs and technology solutions. They gather requirements, model processes, and recommend data-driven improvements.

Network Administrator.description: Network administrators install, configure, and maintain an organization's network infrastructure including routers, switches, firewalls, and VPNs.

Database Administrator.description: Database administrators manage, secure, and optimize databases that store critical organizational data. They ensure availability, integrity, and performance of data systems.

Web Developer.description: Web developers design and build websites and web applications, working on frontend (UI/UX), backend (server logic), or full-stack across both layers.

Mobile App Developer.description: Mobile app developers build native or cross-platform applications for iOS and Android devices, creating user-friendly and performant mobile experiences.

DevOps Engineer.description: DevOps engineers bridge development and operations by automating CI/CD pipelines, managing infrastructure as code, and enabling rapid, reliable software delivery.

IT Consultant.description: IT consultants advise organizations on technology strategy, implementation, and optimization. They require broad technical knowledge combined with strong business acumen and communication.
